curation_notes: The advisory explicitly references src/executor.ts line 304, where the property key parameter b is typed as string but never enforced at runtime. The patch changes b's type to PropertyKey and adds an isPropertyKey() guard that coerces non-PropertyKey values to strings before use, closing the TOCTOU gap. assignCheck was also patched to use a safe hasOwnProperty helper instead of calling obj.context.hasOwnProperty(obj.prop) directly, which was similarly vulnerable to TOCTOU via custom toString(). The patch modifies 4 non-test source files (SandboxExec.ts, executor.ts, parser.ts, utils.ts), making it noisy. Locations were derived primarily from the advisory description pointing to executor.ts, confirmed by the patch diff.
